textByHashes.1d4dde0aebc8d27ee800c288a2f34251d35a1472: I'm Nigel. It is my job to tell you about Deadman Mode.
textByHashes.e4e0a859b4ea9261aae2cadbcad4cfdff5a95364: Well, yes, but there's some information you're going to want first.
textByHashes.961f6116ce8d0798934ccbb736fb27b43ab0c3c9: Now, if you wouldn't mind signing a few waivers...
textByHashes.92a64c65e5788b3d66ff60f3df7cea957d44e183: Very well. To complete your conversion, you will need to switch to a Deadman: Annihilation world.
textByHashes.315d0f920546a7f4427a5cb4b09b6adfe932513d: If you leave Lumbridge, speak to me again, or log back in to a Permanent Deadman world, your account conversion will be cancelled.
textByHashes.f5af9a4d0231517461029021e0221bfa63b59fe8: And yes, I'm making you choose a world yourself. This is a big decision, you know!
textByHashes.babbe22bc846e90129c78a56539e83044ad52a03: What would you like to know?
textByHashes.5acceee6ff34a99f5d4eb3dfe31d07558b2fe381: Deadman mode is an incredibly dangerous survival game mode. Anyone can attack anyone, anywhere. Death comes at a huge cost and killing other players can be extremely lucrative.
textByHashes.9e7e525c8aa81424fe00d07e6c6caff97a44aece: Killing a player will earn you all of the items they had on them, plus the 10 most valuable items from their bank. The unfortunate soul will also lose half of their experience in most skills, or a quarter if they were not skulled. Regardless, it's quite the set-back.
textByHashes.5d9d500d8e2f344f268753eb98026719231c53c4: It is, but it is no simple task to kill someone in Deadman mode.
textByHashes.d2c6403016d0aec51ed5b84f803bd6252fb3cfed: Very high level guards patrol every major city and bank. They will kill anyone who has a skull. Getting yourself a kill is only half the battle.
textByHashes.70ed9f0ea2126e00aa9c7fd57a08432800a085e7: You can log into Deadman mode by selecting a Deadman mode world from the world list before you log in.
textByHashes.53ca716aff5789c18cd564e2ee0ef0618275785a: Nope! You can use your existing account on a Deadman world, providing you have membership.
textByHashes.9c56d1b0d63aa77c2b925cdadb8c8d4b24a5a749: No, they do not. Your Deadman mode progress is completely separate from normal Old School worlds.
textByHashes.23ecda34a6b02a4799682f2dcfa5f03b2029b0d2: If you die to a player you will lose the 10 most valuable stacks of items from your bank, all items that you have on your person and half of the experience you have gained in any unprotected skills.
textByHashes.39d830fdedb4120da021397f9d38a26363ecbcb9: If you die to a monster when you have a PK skull you will lose the 10 most valuable stacks of items from your bank, all items that you have on your person and half of the experience you have gained in any unprotected skills.
textByHashes.9c51c19fb4c23469bd7f3b0836185d3e2447f9d9: If you die to a monster when you do not have a PK skull you will lose all of the items on your person except for the 3 most valuable. You will not lose experience or any items from your bank.
textByHashes.ccfd1a1080a468c91a9174529462dc1a96787386: When you kill a player you will receive any items they have on their person and you will also be given a key. You can use this key on Deadman chests found in various banks across the map. Within the chest you will
textByHashes.2ef129e332e10cccbd087201e70db3005c97cc34: find the 10 most valuable stacks of items from the bank of the player you struck down. From here you will be able to choose the items you would like to keep.
textByHashes.069cbed722c443dc85f377daba4b856e42fa9b4f: You can protect up to 10 items by placing them in your safe deposit box. Items in your safe deposit box will not be lost to a player who kills you, unlike those found in your bank. Remember that you can only place 10 single items into your safe deposit box, no stacks.
textByHashes.f65b3afe5e5284530d9de7f0354f32c3d295d2e6: You can protect your levels in up to 2 combat skills and 3 non-combat skills. You can choose which by opening your items lost on death interface found in your equipment tab. Choose wisely!
textByHashes.013dc8d0b93d2f4680b1e1247b2a180c55b6abcf: You should be warned however. If you get killed by a guard, you will lose a tenth of your experience in those skills too!
textByHashes.51db350b1426f4f88afaf55871ff972444bfbf13: Gelin over there also has some deals on insuring your hitpoints, speak to her to find out more about that.
textByHashes.d7762be8ab5bb3fc98df2b0f0e86f2f1bd544d0f: Safe zones are areas patrolled by very high level guards which can be found in various places across the map. The guards watch out for any player with a PK skull and will attack them if they're spotted. It is still possible to be attacked inside safe zones but the person doing the attacking will not stand a chance of making it out alive.
textByHashes.6f7d86e4c6a3f596e5460cc0b1ec2418b273ad60: Yes, I can help with that.
textByHashes.558999f7851f0b5279263d597bf3f180914b38b6: You will no longer gain combat experience. Talk to me again if you change your mind.
textByHashes.5443163cfdec73d163b1e6de2f31e3d7801c2f1c: I've already stopped you from gaining combat experience, do you want to gain it again?
textByHashes.8ab807f35eb9217301bd184749818c18816ee572: You will now gain combat experience again. Talk to me again if you change your mind.
textByHashes.ea2c827ccc4149926c8901aadf9c12dad74f0b38: You will no longer gain hitpoints experience. Talk to me again if you change your mind.
textByHashes.1ad5777f638f74881ac5a3bdf033af9efe9841d8: I've already stopped you from gaining hitpoints experience, do you want to gain it again?
textByHashes.d60e81ed4b144ce23949b8a91613ebdd4aa7d6df: You will now gain hitpoints experience again. Talk to me again if you change your mind.
textByHashes.f0e5b33f0f182eda5f720acacf626e2bef8c3ac3: Certainly! I have a number of unique rewards which you might be interested in.
textByHashes.2708b2eea375326292fe70bca2d718edf6cf8999: Unfortunately the store is not currently available.
textByHashes.0e59fee7b5f5b7ef5c8e13f5b5f554bb5d2ee67b: Sure, but I can only do so once per day. Where would you like to go?
textByHashes.394e3ce2537e545bd226772bfd14c258cc35cc0a: I can only do that once per day, . You've used your daily teleport already.
textByHashes.704c3c9af1788c64f72a46a90da87d2f49f43820: Ah, I see you've changed your mind about transferring your account. Not to worry, I've cancelled that now. Can I help you with anything else?
textByHashes.c8f4b2d47488dbc0ec11bc5e534baa4fc01335a0: Aha, blood money, the currency of a warrior! You must be rewarded! What would you like?
textByHashes.6362c11e1b915a77070bdfa945652081465b7593: More blood money! I commend you on your strength. What item would you like this time?
textByHashes.12dccd1706a2d6864c358248f666315a06132fd2: More blood money! Truly the blood lust is strong in you. Here, take this final item. You deserve it!
textByHashes.1b7fa7444acfc301a7635509fe09d03bb26b872d: More blood money! I can only commend you on your prowess. Alas, I have no more armour to give to you at this time.
textByHashes.254d1304b5c159585d6bd8e5779f9aa5043c2b0d: Bring me an imbued Zamorak, Guthix or Saradomin Cape and I'll give it a trim.
textByHashes.8addf2ba138da11c7e4bc90b9c666912c3a7a87e: Bring me a Toxic Staff of the Dead, Bow of Faerdhinen (c) or Crystal armour and I'll give it a trim.
textByHashes.eed6dcb64069cd043eb156336c3ffd866eb6f37b: I cannot teleport you in this version of Deadman.
